## Summary
Describe what changed.

## Why
Explain why this change is needed.

## Scope
List the files / modules / areas affected.

## How to verify
Describe the exact validation steps.

- [ ] Tests added or updated where needed
- [ ] Verified locally
- [ ] Relevant docs / types updated where needed

## Risks / Compatibility impact
Describe regression risk, compatibility impact, or notable edge cases.

## Related issue
- closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] This PR stays within the approved scope
- [ ] No unrelated refactor is included
- [ ] Behavior changes are covered by tests or equivalent validation
- [ ] No secrets are hardcoded
- [ ] Issue / label / milestone are checked
